summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations planned because this is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, low-signal closure is disabled, and several PRs require maintainer/product judgment or proof/check repair before any higher-risk action.
